---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

Read in data: 
```{r}
setwd("/Users/edenlab/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-PennO365/Double_Hit/2025")
completed_data<- read.csv('bcf_completed_data.csv', header=T)
```

Make a function to plot: 
```{r}
get_ate_draws <- function(fit) {
  # fit$tau is (draws x N). Row means = ATE draw for each iteration.
  rowMeans(fit$tau)
}

get_subgroup_ate_draws <- function(fit, moderator, model_label, mod_label = "Moderator") {
  tau_draws <- fit$tau                       # (draws x N)
  stopifnot(ncol(tau_draws) == length(moderator))  # ensure alignment

  # Coerce moderator to Low/High factor robustly (handles 0/1 or strings)
  if (is.numeric(moderator)) {
    mod_cat <- factor(moderator, levels = c(0,1), labels = c("Low","High"))
  } else {
    # accept "0"/"1" or already "Low"/"High"
    if (all(unique(moderator) %in% c("0","1"))) {
      mod_cat <- factor(moderator, levels = c("0","1"), labels = c("Low","High"))
    } else {
      mod_cat <- factor(moderator)
      # try to standardize common labels
      levels(mod_cat) <- sub("^(low).*","Low", tolower(levels(mod_cat)))
      levels(mod_cat) <- sub("^(high).*","High", tolower(levels(mod_cat)))
      mod_cat <- factor(mod_cat, levels = c("Low","High"))
    }
  }

  idx_low  <- which(mod_cat == "Low")
  idx_high <- which(mod_cat == "High")
  stopifnot(length(idx_low)  > 0, length(idx_high) > 0)

  ATE_low_draws  <- rowMeans(tau_draws[, idx_low,  drop = FALSE])
  ATE_high_draws <- rowMeans(tau_draws[, idx_high, drop = FALSE])

  bind_rows(
    tibble(model = model_label, group = paste("Low",  mod_label), ATE = ATE_low_draws),
    tibble(model = model_label, group = paste("High", mod_label), ATE = ATE_high_draws)
  )
}
```

load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_adi_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_adi_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_adi_BIN_t1.RData")
```

Run loop for ADI:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T1)"  = bcf_out_SENS_odd_adi_BIN_t1,
  "CD (T1)"   = bcf_out_SENS_con_adi_BIN_t1,
  "ADHD (T1)" = bcf_out_SENS_add_adi_BIN_t1
)

mod_name <- "adi_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "ADI"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)")))
```

Plot ADI models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

delta_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  rename_with(~ "ATE", .cols = matches("^(ATE|ate)$"), ignore.case = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  arrange(model, group) %>%          # keep order predictable
  mutate(draw = row_number()) %>%    # index draws within each model x group
  ungroup()%>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols   = c(model, draw),
    names_from = group,
    values_from = ATE,
    names_prefix = "ATE_"
  )%>%
  mutate(delta = `ATE_High ADI` - `ATE_Low ADI`)%>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    delta_low95 = quantile(delta, probs = 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_med   = median(delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_up95  = quantile(delta, probs = 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

delta_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

adi_t1<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low ADI" = "#CDE8FA", "High ADI" = "#4A8DBA")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low ADI" = "#CDE8FA", "High ADI" = "#4A8DBA")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position='bottom') 

adi_t1

```
load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_crime_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_crime_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_crime_BIN_t1.RData")
```

Run loop for Crime:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T1)"  = bcf_out_odd_crime_BIN_t1,
  "CD (T1)"   = bcf_out_con_crime_BIN_t1,
  "ADHD (T1)" = bcf_out_add_crime_BIN_t1
)

mod_name <- "crime_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "Crime"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)")))
```

Plot Crime models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

delta_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  rename_with(~ "ATE", .cols = matches("^(ATE|ate)$"), ignore.case = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  arrange(model, group) %>%          # keep order predictable
  mutate(draw = row_number()) %>%    # index draws within each model x group
  ungroup()%>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols   = c(model, draw),
    names_from = group,
    values_from = ATE,
    names_prefix = "ATE_"
  )%>%
  mutate(delta = `ATE_High Crime` - `ATE_Low Crime`)%>%
  group_by(model) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    delta_low95 = quantile(delta, probs = 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_med   = median(delta, na.rm = TRUE),
    delta_up95  = quantile(delta, probs = 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

delta_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

crime_t1<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low Crime" = "#D9B4F0", "High Crime" = "#5e3c99")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low Crime" ="#D9B4F0", "High Crime" = "#5e3c99")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

crime_t1

```

load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_green_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_green_BIN_t1.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_green_BIN_t1.RData")
```

Run loop for Green:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T1)"  = bcf_out_con_green_BIN_t1,
  "CD (T1)"   = bcf_out_con_green_BIN_t1,
  "ADHD (T1)" = bcf_out_add_green_BIN_t1
)

mod_name <- "green_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "Green Space"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T1)", "ODD (T1)", "ADHD (T1)")))
```

Plot Crime models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

green_t1<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low Green Space" = "#C3E8A5", "High Green Space" = "#5CA81E")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low Green Space" = "#C3E8A5", "High Green Space" = "#5CA81E")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

green_t1
```

load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_adi_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_adi_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_adi_BIN_t3.RData")
```

Run loop for ADI:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T3)"  = bcf_out_SENS_odd_adi_BIN_t3,
  "CD (T3)"   = bcf_out_SENS_con_adi_BIN_t3,
  "ADHD (T3)" = bcf_out_SENS_add_adi_BIN_t3
)

mod_name <- "adi_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "ADI"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)")))
```

Plot ADI models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

adi_t2<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low ADI" = "#CDE8FA", "High ADI" = "#4A8DBA")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low ADI" = "#CDE8FA", "High ADI" = "#4A8DBA")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position='bottom') 

adi_t2

```

load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_crime_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_crime_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_crime_BIN_t3.RData")
```

Run loop for Crime:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T3)"  = bcf_out_odd_crime_BIN_t3,
  "CD (T3)"   = bcf_out_con_crime_BIN_t3,
  "ADHD (T3)" = bcf_out_add_crime_BIN_t3
)

mod_name <- "crime_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "Crime"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)")))
```

Plot Crime models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

crime_t2<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low Crime" = "#D9B4F0", "High Crime" = "#5e3c99")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low Crime" ="#D9B4F0", "High Crime" = "#5e3c99")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

crime_t2

```

load models:
```{r}
setwd('/Users/edenlab/OneDrive - PennO365/Double_Hit/2025/sensitivity')

load("bcf_model_conduct_green_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_odd_green_BIN_t3.RData")
load("bcf_model_adhd_green_BIN_t3.RData")
```

Run loop for Segregation:
```{r}
fits_mod <- list(
  "ODD (T3)"  = bcf_out_SENS_con_green_BIN_t3,
  "CD (T3)"   = bcf_out_SENS_con_green_BIN_t3,
  "ADHD (T3)" = bcf_out_SENS_add_green_BIN_t3
)

mod_name <- "green_bin"   

ate_long_mod <- imap_dfr(
  fits_mod,
  ~ get_subgroup_ate_draws(
      fit         = .x,
      moderator   = completed_data[[mod_name]],
      model_label = .y,
      mod_label   = "Green Space"          # label to print next to Low/High (customize per your moderator)
    ))%>%
  mutate(model = factor(model, level = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)"), 
                        labels = c("CD (T3)", "ODD (T3)", "ADHD (T3)")))
```

Plot Crime models: 
```{r}
sum_df <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    low95 = quantile(ATE, .025),
    med   = median(ATE),
    up95  = quantile(ATE, .975),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sum_df

peaks <- ate_long_mod %>%
  group_by(model, group) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(peak_y = max(density(ATE)$y), .groups = "drop")

sum_df2 <- left_join(sum_df, peaks, by = c("model","group")) %>%
  pivot_longer(c(low95, med, up95), names_to = "stat", values_to = "x")

green_t2<- ggplot(ate_long_mod, aes(x = ATE, fill = group)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.75) +
  # short vertical markers (peak height) for each subgroup & model
  geom_segment(data = sum_df2,
               aes(x = x, xend = x, y = 0, yend = peak_y,
                   color = group, linetype = stat),
               linewidth = 0.7, show.legend = TRUE) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Low Green Space" = "#C3E8A5", "High Green Space" = "#5CA81E")) +   # adjust if you changed mod_label
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Low Green Space" = "#C3E8A5", "High Green Space" = "#5CA81E")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c(low95 = "dashed", med = "solid", up95 = "dashed")) +
  facet_wrap(~ model, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Average Treatment Effect (τ̄) within subgroup",
       y = "Posterior density",
       fill = "Moderator", color = "Moderator", linetype = NULL) +
  theme_classic() +  guides(linetype="none") + theme(legend.position = 'bottom')

green_t2
```


```{r}
sensitivity_adi<- ggpubr::ggarrange(adi_t1, adi_t2, ncol=2, common.legend=T, labels=c("A", "B"))
sensitivity_crime<- ggpubr::ggarrange(crime_t1, crime_t2, ncol=2, common.legend=T,labels=c("A", "B"))
sensitivity_green<- ggpubr::ggarrange(green_t1, green_t2, ncol=2, common.legend=T, labels=c("A", "B"))
sensitivity_adi
sensitivity_crime
sensitivity_green
```
